Shot from an extremely low ground-level perspective, camera nearly scraping the pavement. The cat’s expression is extremely exaggerated with intense surprise: eyes fully widened and bulging with large dilated pupils, eyebrows raised, ears tightly pinned back, and mouth stretched wide open in a dramatic mid-yowl showing teeth and tongue. Whiskers flare outward and forward from the force, and fur is blown backward by speed. Strong directional motion blur streaks the asphalt and surroundings, with elongated lane markings emphasizing the steep descent. Tall apartment buildings rise dramatically on both sides. Wheels show rotational blur, with dust and debris scattering across the pavement. Natural daylight, cinematic contrast, shallow depth of field, wide-angle lens distortion, ultra-realistic textures, heightened sense of speed, shock, and downhill momentum.
